overview: An AI-first CRM module for life science field representatives to log and manage interactions with Healthcare Professionals. Features a split-screen layout with a structured form on the left and an AI chat assistant on the right that understands natural language, extracts structured data, auto-fills the form, and suggests follow-up actions using the Groq API.
features: Split-screen layout: structured HCP interaction form on the left, AI chat assistant on the right
9-field interaction form: HCP Name, Interaction Type, Date/Time, Topics, Materials, Samples, Sentiment, Outcomes, Follow-ups
AI chat panel that understands natural language and auto-fills the form
5 AI tools: Extract Entities, Log Interaction, Edit Interaction, Summarize, Suggest Follow-ups
Groq API integration (gemma2-9b-it) for intelligent data extraction and summarization
Interaction history with search and edit capabilities
Zustand state management for form, chat, and interaction history
Google Inter font, clean modern Tailwind CSS design
